description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden counter or bar unit with a rich, dark brown finish and a prominent, double-arched back panel. The front features recessed rectangular panels and a brass-colored foot rail along the base, suggesting a classic or vintage style. The back section contains two open shelving units with three visible shelves each, partially filled with a gray, textured material that may represent decorative filler or simulated goods. The side and rear panels are solid, with the rear showing the full expanse of the wood grain and the side panels maintaining the same finish. The top surfaces are flat and wide, suitable for placing objects or serving items, and the overall construction appears robust and heavy. This piece would be well-suited for use as a bar, reception counter, or service desk in an urban environment such as a café, hotel, or public venue.
description: A large, L-shaped dark wood counter with a double-arched back, open shelving, and brass foot rail, suitable for use as a bar or service desk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-arched back, open shelving with gray filler, and the brass foot rail along the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the counter and the solid wood side panel, with the shelving partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full wood grain of the back panel, with no shelving or openings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the L-shape, solid side panel, and partial view of the shelving and counter surface.
